title: Enterprise X-Series - MaiStorage
text:
Enterprise X-Series - MaiStorage
Skip to content
Performance X-Series
Powered by Phison, MaiStorage’s highest performing enterprise-class SSDs are designed for extreme write intensity with vast capacity options allowing for scale and efficiency while reducing operating costs. X-Series comes in the latest form factors and is unmatched in features, giving you custom SSD results with an off-the-shelf buying experience.
X200Z
Extreme Speed and Endurance for Caching Workloads
Explicitly engineered as a high-performance cache SSD, the X200Z delivers uncompromising performance and endurance in a Gen5 SSD architecture. As the latest addition to the X-Series, the X200Z excels with ultra-low latency, ultra-fast write speeds and industry-leading durability, perfectly suited for demanding caching workloads in enterprise environments such as real-time analytics, transactional databases, and AI acceleration and training.
With Storage Class Memory (SCM) responsiveness and support for up to 60 Drive Writes Per Day (DWPD), the X200Z is built to thrive under continuous, intensive write operations. Designed for enterprises that demand efficiency, reliability, and performance without compromise, the X200Z sets a new benchmark for enterprise cache SSDs.
Contact us
Download brochure
Interface Specifications
PCIe 5.0 2x2 (Dual port)
Capacity
Up to 3.2TB
SSD Power Consumption
Active: 21W
Idle: 5W
Performance
Seq Read (up to)
14.8 GB/s
Seq Write (up to)
9.5 GB/s
Random Read (up to)
3,100K IOPS
Random Write (up to)
950K IOPS
X200
X200 Feature-Rich PCIe Gen5 Enterprise Storage Solutions
The X200 exists to support your diverse requirements in a single series. X200 delivers both single-port and dual-port modes while shipping in U.2 2.5″ and E3.S form factors to give your data center reliable and predictable performance that exceeds industry standards.
Contact us
Download brochure
Interface Specifications
U.2 or E3.S
PCIe Gen5x4 Dual Port
1 or 3 DWPD
Capacity
1.6 TB up to 30.72 TB
SSD Power Consumption
Active: 25W
Idle: 5W
Performance
Seq Read (up to)
14.8 GB/s
Seq Write (up to)
8.7 GB/s
Random Read (up to)
3,000 KIOPs
Random Write (up to)
900 KIOPs
X100
X100 PCIe Gen4 Enterprise SSD
The X100 SSD offers unrivaled performance while consuming the least amount of power for its class.
Utilizing unique and patented CPU architecture, the X100 is available up to 30.72TB at only 21W. X100 is compliant with FIPS-140 standards for cryptographic modules and is available with other security specifications.
Support through our customization services allows you to align this solution with your required security standards.
Contact us
Download brochure
Interface Specifications
U.3
PCIe Gen4x4 Dual Port
1 or 3 DWPD
Capacity
1.6 TB up to 30.72 TB
SSD Power Consumption
Active: 21W
Idle: 6W
Performance
Seq Read (up to)
7.4 GB/s
Seq Write (up to)
6.9 GB/s
Random Read (up to)
1,750 KIOPs
Random Write (up to)
480 KIOPs
Malaysia's New Storage Technology Solutions Supplier
